title: sauropus albicans var. zeylanicus
intro: Sauropus albicans var. zeylanicus, also known as Zeylanic acid or Pui, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly used in traditional medicine. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic compounds. The health benefits of Sauropus albicans var. zeylanicus include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as acting as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
